# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies: []

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-deployment
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
              image: "my-app:latest"
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
              securityContext:
                allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
                privileged: false

  service.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-service
    spec:
      type: ClusterIP
      ports:
        - port: 80
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}

values.yaml:
  replicaCount: 1
  image:
    repository: my-app
    tag: latest
  service:
    enabled: true
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80
